name: Cherokee Bean Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the brown beans in plain water until they are tender.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the cornmeal, flour, and baking soda. Mix well to ensure even distribution of ingredients.
3. Add the boiling beans and some of their cooking liquid to the cornmeal mixture. Mix thoroughly to form a stiff dough.
4. Roll the dough into small balls using your hands or a rolling pin.
5. Carefully drop the bean balls into a pot of boiling hot water.
6. Allow the bean balls to cook for 30 minutes at a gentle simmer, ensuring they remain tender and fully cooked through.
